'''dhajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readme|readme]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readme|readme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhajaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæjækæth|dhæjækæth]] || [[word:dhæjækæj|dhæjækæj]] || [[word:dhæjækæsh|dhæjækæsh]] || [[word:dhæjækæ|dhæjækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajajakath|dhajajakath]] || [[word:dhajajakaj|dhajajakaj]] || [[word:dhajajakash|dhajajakash]] || [[word:dhajajaka|dhajajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajakath|dhajakath]] || [[word:dhajakaj|dhajakaj]] || [[word:dhajakash|dhajakash]] || [[word:dhajaka|dhajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajafkath|dhajafkath]] || [[word:dhajafkaj|dhajafkaj]] || [[word:dhajafkash|dhajafkash]] || [[word:dhajafkaf|dhajafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhajakatha|dhajakatha]] || [[word:dhajakaja|dhajakaja]] || [[word:dhajakasha|dhajakasha]] || [[word:dhajakaka|dhajakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhajakath|dhajakath]] || [[word:dhajakaj|dhajakaj]] || [[word:dhajakash|dhajakash]] || [[word:dhajaka|dhajaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhajakathal|dhajakathal]] || [[word:dhajakajal|dhajakajal]] || [[word:dhajakashal|dhajakashal]] || [[word:dhajakakal|dhajakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhajakathatha|dhajakathatha]] || [[word:dhajakajaja|dhajakajaja]] || [[word:dhajakashasha|dhajakashasha]] || [[word:dhajakaka|dhajakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhajakathan|dhajakathan]] || [[word:dhajakajan|dhajakajan]] || [[word:dhajakashan|dhajakashan]] || [[word:dhajakakan|dhajakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhajakathaoro|dhajakathaoro]] || [[word:dhajakajaoro|dhajakajaoro]] || [[word:dhajakashaoro|dhajakashaoro]] || [[word:dhajakakaoro|dhajakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
